name: Easy-Refreshing Summer Dessert
recipeIngredient: 13 ounces Crushed Pineapple in Own Juice
1 package Frozen Raspberries (10 oz) - Not in Syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw the frozen orange juice.
2. Combine all ingredients well.
3. Freeze the mixture overnight.
4. Thaw to slush stage and serve with an ice cream scoop.
5. Serves 8.
